summary: A slow, solo photography-focused route around Iceland's south coast, prioritizing golden-hour locations.

stops.name: Reynisfjara Black Sand Beach
stops.reason: Iconic photography location best visited unhurried at sunrise.

stops.name: Skógafoss
stops.reason: Accessible waterfall well suited to a slow solo shooting pace.

stops.name: Jökulsárlón
stops.reason: Glacier lagoon with strong golden-hour light, matches your interest.
